html:
The Umbrella is a Survival item that slows the rate at which the player gains Wetness by 90% and provides moderate protection from Overheating while equipped. It requires 6 Twigs, 1 Pig Skin, and 2 Silk to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It loses durability when held, lasting a total of 6 days. It can be repaired with a Sewing Kit, restoring 83% durability.

The Umbrella does not provide protection against Lightning.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Lover's Umbrella skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
  • The Elegant Webrolly skin is obtained by purchasing the Webber and Spider Warrior Funko Pop! figure set, e.g. from the Klei Store.
  • The Loyal Big Top Umbrella skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 6, 2018 to December 20, 2018, and from February 21, 2019 to February 28, 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
Woven - Elegant
Forlorn Collection
Baleful Lace Parasol
The previous owner must not have liked the sun.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Pig King Collection
Lover's Umbrella
Lovers love to walk in the rain.
See ingame
Elegant
Webrolly
This itsy bitsy spider has no fear of rain.
Loyal
Side Show Collection
Big Top Umbrella
Keeping dry is the main attraction.
See ingame

Tips

  • For 100% water resistance, a player can hold an umbrella while wearing a Battle Helm, Beefalo Hat, Breezy Vest, Football Helmet, Miner Hat, Rain Hat, Shelmet, Spiderhat, Straw Hat, Summer Frest, or Top Hat.

Trivia

  • The Umbrella was added during A Little Rain Must Fall update of Don't Starve's beta testing period.
  • Using Pig Skin to make an Umbrella may be a reference to Robinson Crusoe's umbrella.

Gallery

  • The Umbrella on the ground and equipped.
  • Wilson with an Umbrella in the rain so Sanity stays intact.
  • The update A Little Rain Must Fall introduced rain and the Umbrella.
  • Wes figurine with an Umbrella.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

–Wurt
“It'll stop the raindrops from falling on my head.”
–Walter
“A handy little rain napper.”
–Wanda
The Umbrella is a Survival item that slows the rate at which the player gains Wetness by 90% and provides moderate protection from Overheating while equipped. It requires 6 Twigs, 1 Pig Skin, and 2 Silk to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It loses durability when held, lasting a total of 6 days. It can be repaired with a Sewing Kit, restoring 83% durability.
The Umbrella does not provide protection against Lightning.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Woven - Elegant Lover's Umbrella skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
The Elegant Webrolly skin is obtained by purchasing the Webber and Spider Warrior Funko Pop! figure set, e.g. from the Klei Store.
The Loyal Big Top Umbrella skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 6, 2018 to December 20, 2018, and from February 21, 2019 to February 28, 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.

For 100% water resistance, a player can hold an umbrella while wearing a Battle Helm, Beefalo Hat, Breezy Vest, Football Helmet, Miner Hat, Rain Hat, Shelmet, Spiderhat, Straw Hat, Summer Frest, or Top Hat.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Umbrella was added during A Little Rain Must Fall update of Don't Starve's beta testing period.
Using Pig Skin to make an Umbrella may be a reference to Robinson Crusoe's umbrella.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ô là một vật phẩm Sinh tồn có tác dụng làm chậm tốc độ người chơi tăng Độ ẩm đi 90% và cung cấp khả năng bảo vệ vừa phải khỏi Quá nóng khi trang bị. Nó cần 6 Cành Cây, 1 Da Lợn và 2 Tơ để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó mất độ bền khi cầm, kéo dài tổng cộng 6 ngày. Nó có thể được sửa chữa bằng Bộ Khâu, phục hồi độ bền 83%.

Unless you check the weather reports. |wormwood = Rain Taker |winona = It serves its purpose. |wortox = No soggy imps on this fine day! |wurt = Umm-brella keep rain away! |walter = It'll stop the raindrops from falling on my head. |wanda=A handy little rain napper. |choose = wilson}} The '''Umbrella''' is a [[Survival]] item that slows the rate at which the player gains [[Wetness]] by 90% and provides moderate protection from [[Overheating]] while equipped. It requires 6 [[Twigs]], 1 [[Pig Skin]], and 2 [[Silk]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It loses durability when held, lasting a total of 6 days. It can be repaired with a [[Sewing Kit]], restoring 83% durability. The Umbrella does not provide protection against [[Lightning]]. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Tools Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Lover's Umbrella''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Pig King]] event in 2019. * The '''Elegant Webrolly''' skin is obtained by purchasing the [[Webber]] and [[Spider/Warrior|Spider Warrior]] Funko Pop! figure set, e.g. from the [https://shop.klei.com/ Klei Store]. * The '''Loyal Big Top Umbrella''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from December 6, 2018 to December 20, 2018, and from February 21, 2019 to February 28, 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
